nasb.text: Then I, Daniel, looked and behold, two others were standing, one on this bank of the river and the other on that bank of the river.

esv.text: Then I, Daniel, looked, and behold, two others stood, one on this bank of the stream and one on that bank of the stream.

cnv.text: 我但以理觀看，看見另有兩個天使，一個站在河岸的這邊，一個站在河岸的那邊。

ccb.text: 我但以理观看，见另有两个人分别站在河的两岸。
